title: Gymnostachyum nudispicum
taxonomy: Gymnostachyum nudispicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant is typically found growing in a variety of habitats, including forests and grasslands. Gymnostachyum nudispicum is classified as a species of the genus Gymnostachyum, which consists of several other species of flowering plants. Within the family Acanthaceae, the plant belongs to the order Lamiales.
